title: Go 1.26 and amqp091-go 1.12 Client Contract · Go Build Room
summary: A Go pairing room incrementally implements a reviewed Go client API and lifecycle contract, first with deterministic values and then with a changed failure, while keeping prior messaging invariants active. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a reviewed Go client API and lifecycle contract while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin Go 1.26.5, amqp091-go 1.12.0, AMQP 0-9-1, RabbitMQ 4.3.2, and the tested operating targets as one reviewed compatibility contract.
Classify amqp091-go methods, synchronous errors, notification channels, delivery channels, contexts, and confirmation streams by ownership and completion meaning.
Treat Delivery fields, properties, headers, and body bytes as untrusted data and validate decoded Go values before domain use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Runtime Client Version
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go messaging team handles case 3346 during confirm-window load test with broker flow control. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate delivered bytes and amqp091 notification ownership without mistaking Go types for validation; separate deterministic browser proof from race-enabled and live-broker evidence; then make one state notification stale after recovery generation changes. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Pin Go 1.26.5, amqp091-go 1.12.0, AMQP 0-9-1, RabbitMQ 4.3.2, and the tested operating targets as one reviewed compatibility contract.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Runtime Client Version.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for pin go 1.26.5, amqp091-go 1.12.0, amqp 0-9-1, rabbitmq 4.3.2, and the tested operating targets as one reviewed compatibility contract. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Runtime Client Version, keep Runtime Client Version connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.
